title: Doubtnut is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Doubtnut is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Doubtnut invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Doubtnut:
Doubtnut is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Doubtnut!
